TypeSignature.Value: .class public auto ansi abstract sealed beforefieldinit ProjectsAgentsModelFactory extends System.Object

Docs.summary: A factory class for creating instances of the models for mocking.

MemberSignature.Value: public static Azure.AI.Projects.Agents.A2APreviewTool A2APreviewTool (Uri baseUri = default, string agentCardPath = default, string projectConnectionId = default);
.method public static hidebysig class Azure.AI.Projects.Agents.A2APreviewTool A2APreviewTool(class System.Uri baseUri, string agentCardPath, string projectConnectionId) cil managed
Public Shared Function A2APreviewTool (Optional baseUri As Uri = Nothing, Optional agentCardPath As String = Nothing, Optional projectConnectionId As String = Nothing) As A2APreviewTool
static member A2APreviewTool : Uri * string * string -> Azure.AI.Projects.Agents.A2APreviewTool

Docs.param: Base URL of the agent.
The path to the agent card relative to the `base_url`. If not provided, defaults to `/.well-known/agent-card.json`
The connection ID in the project for the A2A server. The connection stores authentication and other connection details needed to connect to the A2A server.
Docs.summary: An agent implementing the A2A protocol.

MemberSignature.Value: public static Azure.AI.Projects.Agents.AgentDefinition AgentDefinition (string kind = default, Azure.AI.Projects.Agents.ContentFilterConfiguration contentFilterConfiguration = default);

.method public static hidebysig class Azure.AI.Projects.Agents.AgentDefinition AgentDefinition(string kind, class Azure.AI.Projects.Agents.ContentFilterConfiguration contentFilterConfiguration) cil managed

static member AgentDefinition : string * Azure.AI.Projects.Agents.ContentFilterConfiguration -> Azure.AI.Projects.Agents.AgentDefinition

Docs.param: Configuration for Responsible AI (RAI) content filtering and safety features.
Docs.summary: The AgentDefinition. Please note this is the abstract base class. The derived classes available for instantiation are: , , and .

MemberSignature.Value: public static Azure.AI.Projects.Agents.AgentManifestOptions AgentManifestOptions (System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary<string,string> metadata = default, string description = default, string manifestId = default, System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary<string,BinaryData> parameterValues = default);

.method public static hidebysig class Azure.AI.Projects.Agents.AgentManifestOptions AgentManifestOptions(class System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary`2<string, string> metadata, string description, string manifestId, class System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary`2<string, class System.BinaryData> parameterValues) cil managed

Public Shared Function AgentManifestOptions (Optional metadata As IDictionary(Of String, String) = Nothing, Optional description As String = Nothing, Optional manifestId As String = Nothing, Optional parameterValues As IDictionary(Of String, BinaryData) = Nothing) As AgentManifestOptions

static member AgentManifestOptions : System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary<string, string> * string * string * System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary<string, BinaryData> -> Azure.AI.Projects.Agents.AgentManifestOptions

Docs.param: Set of 16 key-value pairs that can be attached to an object. This can be useful for storing additional information about the object in a structured format, and querying for objects via API or the dashboard. Keys are strings with a maximum length of 64 characters. Values are strings with a maximum length of 512 characters.
A human-readable description of the agent.
The manifest ID to import the agent version from.
The inputs to the manifest that will result in a fully materialized Agent.
Docs.summary: The AgentManifestOptions.

Docs.param: To be added.
To be added.
Docs.summary: To be added.

Docs.summary: A tool that can be used to generate a response. Please note this is the abstract base class. The derived classes available for instantiation are: , , , , , , , , , , and .

MemberSignature.Value: public static Azure.AI.Projects.Agents.AgentVersion AgentVersion (System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary<string,string> metadata = default, string id = default, string name = default, string version = default, string description = default, DateTimeOffset createdAt = default, Azure.AI.Projects.Agents.AgentDefinition definition = default);

.method public static hidebysig class Azure.AI.Projects.Agents.AgentVersion AgentVersion(class System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary`2<string, string> metadata, string id, string name, string version, string description, valuetype System.DateTimeOffset createdAt, class Azure.AI.Projects.Agents.AgentDefinition definition) cil managed

Public Shared Function AgentVersion (Optional metadata As IDictionary(Of String, String) = Nothing, Optional id As String = Nothing, Optional name As String = Nothing, Optional version As String = Nothing, Optional description As String = Nothing, Optional createdAt As DateTimeOffset = Nothing, Optional definition As AgentDefinition = Nothing) As AgentVersion

static member AgentVersion : System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary<string, string> * string * string * string * string * DateTimeOffset * Azure.AI.Projects.Agents.AgentDefinition -> Azure.AI.Projects.Agents.AgentVersion
MemberSignature.Usage: Azure.AI.Projects.Agents.ProjectsAgentsModelFactory.AgentVersion (metadata, id, name, version, description, createdAt, definition)

Docs.param: Set of 16 key-value pairs that can be attached to an object. This can be useful for storing additional information about the object in a structured format, and querying for objects via API or the dashboard. Keys are strings with a maximum length of 64 characters. Values are strings with a maximum length of 512 characters.
The unique identifier of the agent version.
The name of the agent. Name can be used to retrieve/update/delete the agent.
The version identifier of the agent. Agents are immutable and every update creates a new version while keeping the name same.
A human-readable description of the agent.
The Unix timestamp (seconds) when the agent was created.
Docs.summary: The AgentVersion.

MemberSignature.Value: public static Azure.AI.Projects.Agents.AgentVersionCreationOptions AgentVersionCreationOptions (System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary<string,string> metadata = default, string description = default, Azure.AI.Projects.Agents.AgentDefinition definition = default);

.method public static hidebysig class Azure.AI.Projects.Agents.AgentVersionCreationOptions AgentVersionCreationOptions(class System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary`2<string, string> metadata, string description, class Azure.AI.Projects.Agents.AgentDefinition definition) cil managed

static member AgentVersionCreationOptions : System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary<string, string> * string * Azure.AI.Projects.Agents.AgentDefinition -> Azure.AI.Projects.Agents.AgentVersionCreationOptions

Docs.param: Set of 16 key-value pairs that can be attached to an object. This can be useful for storing additional information about the object in a structured format, and querying for objects via API or the dashboard. Keys are strings with a maximum length of 64 characters. Values are strings with a maximum length of 512 characters.
A human-readable description of the agent.
The agent definition. This can be a workflow, hosted agent, or a simple agent definition.
Docs.summary: The AgentVersionCreationOptions.

Docs.param: The azure ai search index resource.
Docs.summary: The input definition information for an Azure AI search tool as used to configure an agent.

MemberSignature.Value: public static Azure.AI.Projects.Agents.AzureAISearchToolIndex AzureAISearchToolIndex (string projectConnectionId = default, string indexName = default, Azure.AI.Projects.Agents.AzureAISearchQueryType? queryType = default, int? topK = default, string filter = default, string indexAssetId = default);

.method public static hidebysig class Azure.AI.Projects.Agents.AzureAISearchToolIndex AzureAISearchToolIndex(string projectConnectionId, string indexName, valuetype System.Nullable`1<valuetype Azure.AI.Projects.Agents.AzureAISearchQueryType> queryType, valuetype System.Nullable`1<int32> topK, string filter, string indexAssetId) cil managed

Public Shared Function AzureAISearchToolIndex (Optional projectConnectionId As String = Nothing, Optional indexName As String = Nothing, Optional queryType As Nullable(Of AzureAISearchQueryType) = Nothing, Optional topK As Nullable(Of Integer) = Nothing, Optional filter As String = Nothing, Optional indexAssetId As String = Nothing) As AzureAISearchToolIndex
static member AzureAISearchToolIndex : string * string * Nullable<Azure.AI.Projects.Agents.AzureAISearchQueryType> * Nullable<int> * string * string -> Azure.AI.Projects.Agents.AzureAISearchToolIndex

Docs.param: An index connection ID in an IndexResource attached to this agent.
The name of an index in an IndexResource attached to this agent.
Type of query in an AIIndexResource attached to this agent.
Number of documents to retrieve from search and present to the model.
filter string for search resource. [Learn more here](https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/search/search-filters).
Index asset id for search resource.
Docs.summary: A AI Search Index resource.

Docs.param: The indices attached to this agent. There can be a maximum of 1 index resource attached to the agent.
Docs.summary: A set of index resources used by the `azure_ai_search` tool.

Docs.param: The definition of azure function and its parameters.
Input storage queue. The queue storage trigger runs a function as messages are added to it.
Output storage queue. The function writes output to this queue when the input items are processed.
Docs.summary: The definition of Azure function.

Docs.param: The name of the function to be called.
A description of what the function does, used by the model to choose when and how to call the function.
The parameters the functions accepts, described as a JSON Schema object.
Docs.summary: The AzureFunctionDefinitionFunction.

MemberSignature.Value: public static Azure.AI.Projects.Agents.BingCustomSearchConfiguration BingCustomSearchConfiguration (string projectConnectionId = default, string instanceName = default, string market = default, string setLang = default, long? count = default, string freshness = default);

.method public static hidebysig class Azure.AI.Projects.Agents.BingCustomSearchConfiguration BingCustomSearchConfiguration(string projectConnectionId, string instanceName, string market, string setLang, valuetype System.Nullable`1<int64> count, string freshness) cil managed

static member BingCustomSearchConfiguration : string * string * string * string * Nullable<int64> * string -> Azure.AI.Projects.Agents.BingCustomSearchConfiguration

Docs.param: Project connection id for grounding with bing search.
Name of the custom configuration instance given to config.
The market where the results come from.
The language to use for user interface strings when calling Bing API.
The number of search results to return in the bing api response.
Filter search results by a specific time range. See [accepted values here](https://learn.microsoft.com/bing/search-apis/bing-web-search/reference/query-parameters).
Docs.summary: A bing custom search configuration.

.method public static hidebysig class Azure.AI.Projects.Agents.HostedAgentDefinition HostedAgentDefinition(class Azure.AI.Projects.Agents.ContentFilterConfiguration contentFilterConfiguration, class System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable`1<class Azure.AI.Projects.Agents.AgentTool> tools, class System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable`1<class Azure.AI.Projects.Agents.ProtocolVersionRecord> versions, string cpu, string memory, class System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary`2<string, string> environmentVariables, string image) cil managed

Public Shared Function HostedAgentDefinition (Optional contentFilterConfiguration As ContentFilterConfiguration = Nothing, Optional tools As IEnumerable(Of AgentTool) = Nothing, Optional versions As IEnumerable(Of ProtocolVersionRecord) = Nothing, Optional cpu As String = Nothing, Optional memory As String = Nothing, Optional environmentVariables As IDictionary(Of String, String) = Nothing, Optional image As String = Nothing) As HostedAgentDefinition

static member HostedAgentDefinition : Azure.AI.Projects.Agents.ContentFilterConfiguration * seq<Azure.AI.Projects.Agents.AgentTool> * seq<Azure.AI.Projects.Agents.ProtocolVersionRecord> * string * string * System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary<string, string> * string -> Azure.AI.Projects.Agents.HostedAgentDefinition
MemberSignature.Usage: Azure.AI.Projects.Agents.ProjectsAgentsModelFactory.HostedAgentDefinition (contentFilterConfiguration, tools, versions, cpu, memory, environmentVariables, image)

Docs.param: Configuration for Responsible AI (RAI) content filtering and safety features.
An array of tools the hosted agent's model may call while generating a response. You can specify which tool to use by setting the `tool_choice` parameter.
The protocols that the agent supports for ingress communication of the containers.
The CPU configuration for the hosted agent.
The memory configuration for the hosted agent.
Environment variables to set in the hosted agent container.
The image ID for the agent, applicable to image-based hosted agents.
Docs.summary: The hosted agent definition.

MemberSignature.Value: public static Azure.AI.Projects.Agents.MemorySearchPreviewTool MemorySearchPreviewTool (string memoryStoreName = default, string scope = default, Azure.AI.Projects.Agents.MemorySearchToolOptions searchOptions = default, int? updateDelayInSecs = default);

.method public static hidebysig class Azure.AI.Projects.Agents.MemorySearchPreviewTool MemorySearchPreviewTool(string memoryStoreName, string scope, class Azure.AI.Projects.Agents.MemorySearchToolOptions searchOptions, valuetype System.Nullable`1<int32> updateDelayInSecs) cil managed

Public Shared Function MemorySearchPreviewTool (Optional memoryStoreName As String = Nothing, Optional scope As String = Nothing, Optional searchOptions As MemorySearchToolOptions = Nothing, Optional updateDelayInSecs As Nullable(Of Integer) = Nothing) As MemorySearchPreviewTool
static member MemorySearchPreviewTool : string * string * Azure.AI.Projects.Agents.MemorySearchToolOptions * Nullable<int> -> Azure.AI.Projects.Agents.MemorySearchPreviewTool

Docs.param: The name of the memory store to use.

The namespace used to group and isolate memories, such as a user ID. Limits which memories can be retrieved or updated. Use special variable `{{$userId}}` to scope memories to the current signed-in user.
Options for searching the memory store.
Time to wait before updating memories after inactivity (seconds). Default 300.
Docs.summary: A tool for integrating memories into the agent.

MemberSignature.Value: public static Azure.AI.Projects.Agents.MemorySearchToolOptions MemorySearchToolOptions (int? maxMemories = default);
.method public static hidebysig class Azure.AI.Projects.Agents.MemorySearchToolOptions MemorySearchToolOptions(valuetype System.Nullable`1<int32> maxMemories) cil managed
Public Shared Function MemorySearchToolOptions (Optional maxMemories As Nullable(Of Integer) = Nothing) As MemorySearchToolOptions
static member MemorySearchToolOptions : Nullable<int> -> Azure.AI.Projects.Agents.MemorySearchToolOptions

Docs.param: Maximum number of memory items to return.
Docs.summary: Memory search options.

Public Shared Function OpenApiAuthenticationDetails (Optional type As String = Nothing) As OpenApiAuthenticationDetails
static member OpenApiAuthenticationDetails : string -> Azure.AI.Projects.Agents.OpenApiAuthenticationDetails

Docs.param: The type of authentication, must be anonymous/project_connection/managed_identity.
Docs.summary: authentication details for OpenApiFunctionDefinition Please note this is the abstract base class. The derived classes available for instantiation are: , , and .

MemberSignature.Value: public static Azure.AI.Projects.Agents.OpenApiFunctionDefinition OpenApiFunctionDefinition (string name = default, string description = default, System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary<string,BinaryData> spec = default, Azure.AI.Projects.Agents.OpenApiAuthenticationDetails authenticationDetails = default, System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable<string> defaultParams = default, System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable<Azure.AI.Projects.Agents.OpenAPIFunctionEntry> functions = default);

.method public static hidebysig class Azure.AI.Projects.Agents.OpenApiFunctionDefinition OpenApiFunctionDefinition(string name, string description, class System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary`2<string, class System.BinaryData> spec, class Azure.AI.Projects.Agents.OpenApiAuthenticationDetails authenticationDetails, class System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable`1<string> defaultParams, class System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable`1<class Azure.AI.Projects.Agents.OpenAPIFunctionEntry> functions) cil managed

Public Shared Function OpenApiFunctionDefinition (Optional name As String = Nothing, Optional description As String = Nothing, Optional spec As IDictionary(Of String, BinaryData) = Nothing, Optional authenticationDetails As OpenApiAuthenticationDetails = Nothing, Optional defaultParams As IEnumerable(Of String) = Nothing, Optional functions As IEnumerable(Of OpenAPIFunctionEntry) = Nothing) As OpenApiFunctionDefinition

static member OpenApiFunctionDefinition : string * string * System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary<string, BinaryData> * Azure.AI.Projects.Agents.OpenApiAuthenticationDetails * seq<string> * seq<Azure.AI.Projects.Agents.OpenAPIFunctionEntry> -> Azure.AI.Projects.Agents.OpenApiFunctionDefinition

Docs.param: The name of the function to be called.
A description of what the function does, used by the model to choose when and how to call the function.
The openapi function shape, described as a JSON Schema object.
Open API authentication details.
List of OpenAPI spec parameters that will use user-provided defaults.
List of function definitions used by OpenApi tool.
Docs.summary: The input definition information for an openapi function.

MemberSignature.Value: public static Azure.AI.Projects.Agents.StructuredInputDefinition StructuredInputDefinition (string description = default, BinaryData defaultValue = default, System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary<string,BinaryData> schema = default, bool? isRequired = default);

.method public static hidebysig class Azure.AI.Projects.Agents.StructuredInputDefinition StructuredInputDefinition(string description, class System.BinaryData defaultValue, class System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary`2<string, class System.BinaryData> schema, valuetype System.Nullable`1<bool> isRequired) cil managed

Public Shared Function StructuredInputDefinition (Optional description As String = Nothing, Optional defaultValue As BinaryData = Nothing, Optional schema As IDictionary(Of String, BinaryData) = Nothing, Optional isRequired As Nullable(Of Boolean) = Nothing) As StructuredInputDefinition
static member StructuredInputDefinition : string * BinaryData * System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary<string, BinaryData> * Nullable<bool> -> Azure.AI.Projects.Agents.StructuredInputDefinition

Docs.param: A human-readable description of the input.
The default value for the input if no run-time value is provided.
The JSON schema for the structured input (optional).
Whether the input property is required when the agent is invoked.
Docs.summary: An structured input that can participate in prompt template substitutions and tool argument binding.

MemberSignature.Value: public static Azure.AI.Projects.Agents.StructuredOutputDefinition StructuredOutputDefinition (string name = default, string description = default, System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary<string,BinaryData> schema = default, bool? strict = default);

.method public static hidebysig class Azure.AI.Projects.Agents.StructuredOutputDefinition StructuredOutputDefinition(string name, string description, class System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary`2<string, class System.BinaryData> schema, valuetype System.Nullable`1<bool> strict) cil managed

Docs.param: The name of the structured output.
A description of the output to emit. Used by the model to determine when to emit the output.
The JSON schema for the structured output.
Whether to enforce strict validation. Default `true`.
Docs.summary: A structured output that can be produced by the agent.
